revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lx|Tag|Name|Namespace|Label}} produces {{Lx|Tag|Name|Namespace|Label}} This template is a metatemplate for the [[Template:Ln]]-family. This template should normally not be used on its own. Its purpose is to ensure that all ln-template looks the same. ==Optional parameters== *noedit - adding '''noedit=yes''' will disable and hide the "edit" link. *notalk - adding '''notalk=yes''' will disable and hide the customizable link. ''(This link is usually customized as a "talk" link in templates that transclude this template.)'' *nohistory - adding '''nohistory=yes''' will disable and hide the "history" link. *nolinks - adding '''nolinks=yes''' will disable and hide the "links" link. *nowatch - adding '''nowatch=yes''' will disable and hide the "watch" link. *nologs - adding '''nologs=yes''' will disable and hide the "logs" link. ''(At this time, using this parameter unfortunately doesn't hide the "|" that appears before the "logs" link; however, there will probably never be a case where the "logs" link should not appear.)'' {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Pagelinks templates|Lx]] [[Category:Wikipedia metatemplates|Lx]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lx|Tag|Name|Namespace|Label}} produces {{Lx|Tag|Name|Namespace|Label}} This template is a metatemplate for the [[Template:Ln]]-family. This template should normally not be used on its own. Its purpose is to ensure that all ln-template looks the same. ==Optional parameters== *noedit - adding '''noedit=yes''' will disable and hide the "edit" link. *notalk - adding '''notalk=yes''' will disable and hide the customizable link. ''(This link is usually customized as a "talk" link in templates that transclude this template.)'' *nohistory - adding '''nohistory=yes''' will disable and hide the "history" link. *nolinks - adding '''nolinks=yes''' will disable and hide the "links" link. *nowatch - adding '''nowatch=yes''' will disable and hide the "watch" link. *nologs - adding '''nologs=yes''' will disable and hide the "logs" link. ''(At this time, using this parameter unfortunately doesn't hide the "|" that appears before the "logs" link; however, there will probably never be a case where the "logs" link should not appear.)'' {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Pagelinks templates|Lx]] [[Category:Wikipedia metatemplates|Lx]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lx|Tag|Name|Namespace|Label}} produces {{Lx|Tag|Name|Namespace|Label}} This template is a metatemplate for the [[Template:Ln]]-family. This template should normally not be used on its own. Its purpose is to ensure that all ln-template looks the same. ==Optional parameters== *noedit - adding '''noedit=yes''' will disable and hide the "edit" link. *notalk - adding '''notalk=yes''' will disable and hide the customizable link. ''(This link is usually customized as a "talk" link in templates that transclude this template.)'' *nohistory - adding '''nohistory=yes''' will disable and hide the "history" link. *nolinks - adding '''nolinks=yes''' will disable and hide the "links" link. *nowatch - adding '''nowatch=yes''' will disable and hide the "watch" link. *nologs - adding '''nologs=yes''' will disable and hide the "logs" link. ''(At this time, using this parameter unfortunately doesn't hide the "|" that appears before the "logs" link; however, there will probably never be a case where the "logs" link should not appear.)'' {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Pagelinks templates|Lx]] [[Category:Wikipedia metatemplates|Lx]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lx|Tag|Name|Namespace|Label}} produces {{Lx|Tag|Name|Namespace|Label}} This template is a metatemplate for the [[Template:Ln]]-family. This template should normally not be used on its own. Its purpose is to ensure that all ln-template looks the same. ==Optional parameters== *noedit - adding '''noedit=yes''' will disable and hide the "edit" link. *notalk - adding '''notalk=yes''' will disable and hide the customizable link. ''(This link is usually customized as a "talk" link in templates that transclude this template.)'' *nohistory - adding '''nohistory=yes''' will disable and hide the "history" link. *nolinks - adding '''nolinks=yes''' will disable and hide the "links" link. *nowatch - adding '''nowatch=yes''' will disable and hide the "watch" link. *nologs - adding '''nologs=yes''' will disable and hide the "logs" link. ''(At this time, using this parameter unfortunately doesn't hide the "|" that appears before the "logs" link; however, there will probably never be a case where the "logs" link should not appear.)'' {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Pagelinks templates|Lx]] [[Category:Wikipedia metatemplates|Lx]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23513454770|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lx|Tag|Name|Namespace|Label}} produces {{Lx|Tag|Name|Namespace|Label}} This template is a metatemplate for the [[Template:Ln]]-family. This template should normally not be used on its own. Its purpose is to ensure that all ln-template looks the same. ==Optional parameters== *noedit - adding '''noedit=yes''' will disable and hide the "edit" link. *notalk - adding '''notalk=yes''' will disable and hide the customizable link. ''(This link is usually customized as a "talk" link in templates that transclude this template.)'' *nohistory - adding '''nohistory=yes''' will disable and hide the "history" link. *nolinks - adding '''nolinks=yes''' will disable and hide the "links" link. *nowatch - adding '''nowatch=yes''' will disable and hide the "watch" link. *nologs - adding '''nologs=yes''' will disable and hide the "logs" link. ''(At this time, using this parameter unfortunately doesn't hide the "|" that appears before the "logs" link; however, there will probably never be a case where the "logs" link should not appear.)'' {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Pagelinks templates|Lx]] [[Category:Wikipedia metatemplates|Lx]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lx|Tag|Name|Namespace|Label}} produces {{Lx|Tag|Name|Namespace|Label}} This template is a metatemplate for the [[Template:Ln]]-family. This template should normally not be used on its own. Its purpose is to ensure that all ln-template looks the same. ==Optional parameters== *noedit - adding '''noedit=yes''' will disable and hide the "edit" link. *notalk - adding '''notalk=yes''' will disable and hide the customizable link. ''(This link is usually customized as a "talk" link in templates that transclude this template.)'' *nohistory - adding '''nohistory=yes''' will disable and hide the "history" link. *nolinks - adding '''nolinks=yes''' will disable and hide the "links" link. *nowatch - adding '''nowatch=yes''' will disable and hide the "watch" link. *nologs - adding '''nologs=yes''' will disable and hide the "logs" link. ''(At this time, using this parameter unfortunately doesn't hide the "|" that appears before the "logs" link; however, there will probably never be a case where the "logs" link should not appear.)'' {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Pagelinks templates|Lx]] [[Category:Wikipedia metatemplates|Lx]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
